faults.A170: RAD ON signal (for ext.Ampl.) without Funktion
faults.E18C: Device has Monitoringnachricht not abgenommen or confirmed. (Error Monitoring).
faults.E18D: Weckendes Device has 3 times unsuccessful attempted the network too wake. (Error WakeUp Failed).
faults.E18E: Although Shutdown(Execute) sent was went the light not off. (Error Light Not Off).
faults.E18F: Zentrale Registry matches not with Sollkonfiguration match (Error Registry New).
faults.E190: Ring break diagnosis was performed (Error Ring diagnosis).
faults.E191: Long and/or frequent Unlocks (Error Unlock Long).
faults.E192: On Device has itself due to overtemperature shut off (Error temperature Shutdown).
